SELECT epoch_ms('1970-01-01 00:00:00+00'::TIMESTAMPTZ) AS epoch_start, epoch_ms('2038-01-19 03:14:07+00'::TIMESTAMPTZ) AS epoch_end;
SELECT event_time, epoch_ms(event_time) FROM (SELECT event_time FROM timestamps WHERE event_time >= '2021-01-01 00:00:00+00') subquery;
CREATE TABLE events (id INT, start_time TIMESTAMPTZ, end_time TIMESTAMPTZ);
SELECT e.id, epoch_ms(e.start_time) AS start_epoch, epoch_ms(e.end_time) AS end_epoch FROM events e WHERE e.start_time < e.end_time;
SELECT t.event_time, epoch_ms(t.event_time), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events WHERE start_time < t.event_time) AS event_count FROM timestamps t;
SELECT epoch_ms(t.event_time) FROM timestamps t WHERE t.event_time IN (SELECT start_time FROM events WHERE id = 1);
INSERT INTO time_offsets VALUES (INTERVAL '1 hour'), (INTERVAL '2 hours');
SELECT epoch_ms(event_time + (SELECT max(offset) FROM time_offsets)) FROM timestamps;
